reviews.review_description:
These two kids in the code scream 123 were making fun of me and saying that nobody loves me and call me stupid and call me all these names. They were being very disrespectful towards the community of compile tag and I think you should deal with those two kids in the code scream 123 right now one of them was blue with googly eyes and one of them was having disco or party glasses with the Elliott beanie and because of that they were making it to where they were spamming me and I just reported them twice for toxicity all because they were being very toxic and then they started spam reporting me for no reason so I guarantee you now to deal with these kids and make it aware they get banned for at least three days 
￼

I know, but like I just got the game and I got banned, but I got to still test out the mods when I was banned, but to be honest mid game just try Halloween tag V2. They have active mode and only ban you for a reason. Staff and Admins are always active and don’t delete my review. The game is just made and I’m talking about the game that I’m reviewing right now so I will be honest just don’t download it. Download Halloween tag V2 
￼
basically lemme js explain it, the owner, SUPER CHILL, staff, SUPER HELPFUL, no one could EVER hate this game, if someone disagrees please let me know
I thought the game was good until I met the owner. He is a total jerkand the staff are horrible. They just go in random codes with their cosmetics on and it’s really annoying. I don’t suggest. ￼
I was ban for 3 days and I just got this game i cussed and he gave me one more chance and then I got ban I like the mods and long arms but I got tagged far away no lava monkeys nearby fix it

￼

reviews.review_title: I got banned for being honest.
reviews.review_description: I was in a public and I was just chilling and a mod joined. He had a silver cowboy hat and sounded British and we were all just chilling. But then I got in a argument with some one about saying the b word and I said u can’t say that and he called me the hard R n word and I pointed it out I said he said it and I got banned cause the mod said “it’s my friend it’s ok”” and I got kicked and banned. Fix your dam mods game
